creator: support@nelsonandwright.com
text:
Hello,

If you do the following this fixes this issue with the pr listed below.  
The port maintainer is not responding to emails.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=157089

cd /usr/ports/distfiles
fetch 
http://ftp.riken.go.jp/pub/FreeBSD/distfiles/RESTRICTED/ucspi-ssl-0.70.tar.gz
cd /usr/ports/sysutils/ucspi-ssl
make install

-- 

Bill Olson
Nelson and Wright, Inc.
Voice 207-929-8238
Fax   207-929-4278
